approach: Used akshare library to fetch all ChiNext stocks (938 total), retrieved historical closing prices for the 10 trading days before 2024-05-31, calculated volatility as coefficient of variation (std/mean * 100%), ranked by volatility descending, and selected top 5
assumptions: Used akshare's stock_zh_a_hist with qfq (forward adjusted) prices to account for stock splits and dividends
Calculated standard deviation with ddof=1 (sample standard deviation)
Only included stocks with at least 10 trading days of data in the period
Skipped stocks with data retrieval errors or missing data
